<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$BDPS$ = (Damage * Burst Count) / (Cooldown + (Firerate * Burst Count))
$SDPS$ = [[Splash Damage]] / Firerate
$RDPS$ = Health / Spawnrate
$BRDPS$ = (Health + [[Splash Damage]]) / Spawnrate
$CE$ = Total Price / Combined DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 300; 350; 1800; 4500; 10750
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 0; 0; 4
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Sno'ball Training; Unpaid Labor; Cookie Cutting; A Violent Night
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 125956529169231; 75868965324711; 120660526589244; 70951173324126
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
$UREF$ = <ref name="Unit">Elves are not affected by any buffs or debuffs.</ref>
$BREF$ = <ref>For the [[Gunner Elf]], DPS is calculated as (Damage × Burst Count) ÷ (Cooldown + (Firerate × Burst Count)).</ref>
$GREF$ = <ref>Two [[Gunner Elf|Gunner Elves]] spawn at once.</ref>
$SREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes that only one enemy is hit and it receives full splash damage.</ref>
$BEREF$ = <ref>The [[Bomber Elf (Unit)|Bomber Elf]] only explodes upon death.</ref>
$BDREF$ = <ref>For the [[Bomber Elf (Unit)|Bomber Elf]], the explosion on death damage is included in ram DPS as its health.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="5" |Total Cost
|-
! Level 0 !! Level 1 !! Level 2 !! Level 3 !! Level 4
|-
| {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE@0$}} || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE@1$}} || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE@2$}} || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE@3$}} || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE@4$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Melee Elves$UREF$
|-
! Level !! Minion !! Health !! Defense !! Damage !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Range !! Limit !! DPS !! Ram DPS
|-
| 0-2 || [[Elf]] || 16 || N/A || N/A || 15 || N/A || 1.5 || 10 || N/A || $RDPS$
|-
| 3 || [[Guardian Elf]] || 75 || 30% || 28 || 20 || 0.5 || 7.5 || 4 || $DPS$ || $RDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Guardian Elf]] || 100 || 50% || 42 || 20 || 0.5 || 7.5 || 4 || $DPS$ || $RDPS$
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="12" |Ranged Elves$UREF$
|-
! Level !! Minion !! Health !! Damage !! Burst Count !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Cooldown !! Range !! Limit !! DPS$BREF$ !! Ram DPS
|-
| 1 || [[Snowball Elf]] || 20 || 5 || N/A || 20 || 2.5 || N/A || 18 || 4 || $DPS$ || $RDPS$
|-
| 2 || [[Cannoneer Elf]] || 30 || 5 || N/A || 25 || 0.5 || N/A || 22 || 4 || $DPS$ || $RDPS$
|-
| 3 || [[Gunner Elf]] || 40 || 5 || 6 || 30 || 0.208 || 1 || 22 || 4 || $BDPS$ || $RDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Gunner Elf]]$GREF$ || 50 || 7 || 6 || 30 || 0.2 || 1 || 25 || 4 || $BDPS$ || $RDPS$
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Splash Elves$UREF$
|-
! Level !! Minion !! Health !! [[Splash Damage]] !! Spawnrate !! Firerate !! Range !! Explosion Range !! Limit !! DPS$SREF$ !! Ram DPS$BDREF$
|-
| 2-3 || [[Bomber Elf (Unit)|Bomber Elf]] || 22 || 60$BEREF$ || 25 || N/A || 2.5 || 8 || 10 || N/A || $BRDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Gift Bomber]] || 500 || 150 || 50 || 2. || 14 || 6 || 2 || $SDPS$ || $RDPS$
|-
| 4 || [[Ripped Elf (Unit)|Ripped Elf]] || 800 || 360 || 80 || 6.7 || 40 || 12 || 1 || $SDPS$ || $RDPS$
|}
</div>
